resources.string: Register your first pet to get started
Every pet is up to date
Add your first pet to get started
Couldn\'t use this photo. Choose a JPG or PNG up to 5 MB.
Name must have at most 50 characters
This action cannot be undone. All pet records will be removed.
All data for this pet will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
Weight evolution: from %1$s kg on %2$s to %3$s kg on %4$s
Tap the scale button to add your first measurement
Which pet do you want to record weight for?
Which pet do you want to record a vaccination for?
Which pet do you want to record a deworming for?
Restart the app to apply language changes
Your alerts and reminders will appear here
Automatic reminders before vaccine due dates
Automatic reminders before deworming due dates
Periodic reminders to weigh your pets
What would you like to add?
Tap + to add the first vaccination
Tap + to add the first deworming treatment
Ready to back up to your own Google Drive storage
Connect Google Drive to create a portable backup. A Petit account or payment is not required.
Google Drive backup is not configured in this build
Creating and uploading a portable backup…
Google Drive does not have enough available storage
Backup was interrupted. Try again to resume safely.
Choose how this backup changes local restorable data.
Keep unique local and backup data and resolve conflicts deterministically.
Make restorable data match this backup exactly.
Apply backup preferences and reminder settings
This backup is invalid, unsafe, or incompatible
Restore failed. Local data was rolled back safely.
Pets, health records, tasks, preferences, reminders, and app-owned photos absent from this backup will be removed. Device identity, pairing keys, and authorization remain local.
Save all your data to a JSON file
Restore data from a backup file
This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted:
Imported data will overwrite existing records
Keep the most recently updated version
No events recorded for the selected period
Record %1$s\'s weight to track their progress
Record %1$s\'s vaccines to track the schedule
Record %1$s\'s deworming to not miss dates
Start by recording weight, vaccines or deworming for your pets
Automatic tasks before vaccine due dates
Automatic tasks before deworming due dates
Periodic tasks to weigh your pets
Date must be in the future
Name must be at most 50 characters
Only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens allowed
Birth date cannot be in the future
Notes must be at most 500 characters
Date cannot be in the future
This vaccine is not available for this species
Next dose must be after application date
Note must be at most 500 characters
Medication must be at most 100 characters
Note must be at most 500 characters
Date cannot be in the future
Next dose must be after application date
Date cannot be in the future
Note must be at most 500 characters
Title must be at most 100 characters
Description must be at most 500 characters
Your companion for tracking your pet\'s health, simply and completely.
Register your first pet and start tracking their health today.
Share your pets\' data with your family.
Are you sure you want to leave the family group? Your local data will be kept.
Are you sure you want to remove this device from the family group?
No devices are associated with this group.
The group change could not be saved. Try again.
Choose how to integrate the received data:
Pets, health records, and tasks missing from the received bundle will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
The authorized device is no longer connected.
The data is too large to transfer.
The transfer was interrupted. Try again.
The received data is invalid and was discarded.
The received data could not be read and was discarded.
The received transfer format is not supported.
The save could not be completed. Review the local data before trying again.
No local syncs have been recorded yet.
Sync history could not be loaded.
Ask the other device to send data
Nearby permissions are required to pair devices.
Google Play Services is unavailable on this device.
Couldn’t make this device available for pairing.
Couldn’t connect to the selected device.
Incorrect code. Check it and try again.
This code expired. Generate a new code and try again.
The device is no longer nearby. Try again.
Pairing succeeded, but the group couldn’t be saved. No partial group was kept.
This device was removed from the family group and its previous access key is no longer authorized.
Looking for family devices on this network
No family device found on this network
Requires a newer Petit archive version
Requires a newer Petit data version
Inspect, restore, or delete backups from the connected storage provider
Storage authorization is required to view saved backups.
Some backups could not be deleted. The successful deletions were kept.
Only the selected backups will be permanently deleted. Local data will not change.
Every recognized Petit backup will be permanently deleted. Local data will not change.
The storage provider quota is exceeded.
The storage provider is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
Saved backups could not be loaded.
Keep one inexact daily backup schedule when enabled
Android runs automatic backups when the selected conditions permit; no exact time is guaranteed.
Wait for Wi-Fi or another unmetered connection
Show a silent notification after a successful automatic backup
No backup attempts have been recorded.
Automatic backup will be disabled. Local data and remote backups will not be deleted.
Backup settings could not be updated.
Storage authorization is unavailable in this build.
